name: mikedconcepcion--octoflow
description: Use when the user wants to run GPU-accelerated computations, analyze data, process images/audio/video, train ML models, or generate code from natural language. OctoFlow turns English task descriptions into GPU programs via Vulkan. Also runs as an MCP server (`octoflow mcp-serve`) with 7 structured tools. No Python, no CUDA, no dependencies — single 4.5 MB binary. 445 stdlib modules across 28 domains (sort, search, graph, matrix, stats, DSP, ML, etc.). 150 GPU compute kernels. Loom Engine GPU VM with layer-streaming LLM inference. Use for: "sort a million numbers", "cluster this CSV", "blur this image", "plot my data", "calculate statistics", "run regression", "process audio".
